title: chrio #5548
definition:
1) to anoint
    1a) consecrating Jesus to the Messianic office, and furnishing
        him with the necessary powers for its administration
    1b) enduing Christians with the gifts of the Holy Spirit

 Sinonim   : Lihat Definisi \\5805\\
